final_prompt.prompt:
Create a comprehensive UI design system in classic minimalist tech style, covering web Dashboard, mobile interfaces, cards, buttons, and controls, intended for product design documentation and component library reference.

Style/medium: clean minimalist tech UI design system with the geometric restraint of Dieter Rams, designed for scalable product ecosystems
Composition: modular grid-based layout showcasing Dashboard (desktop), mobile interface mockups, card components, button states, and control variants in a systematic hierarchy
Subject: web Dashboard with data visualization widgets, mobile app interface screens, card component library with variants, button states (primary/secondary/ghost), form controls (inputs, toggles, dropdowns), and iconography set
Scene/backdrop: neutral gray canvas with subtle depth layers, components arranged in logical grouping with generous breathing room between sections
Lighting/mood: crisp digital clarity with soft elevation shadows, the quiet confidence of precision engineering
Color palette: neutral graphite base with one electric accent (cyan or electric blue), high contrast for accessibility, layered depth through subtle tonal shifts
Materials/textures: matte surface finishes with subtle glass-morphism highlights on interactive elements, crisp 1px borders defining component boundaries
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: all components must be production-ready, consistent 8px grid system, accessible contrast ratios, scalable across breakpoints
Avoid: decorative gradients without purpose, skeuomorphic textures, cluttered information density, decorative noise that compromises usability
